name: Friends from ZZZ
description:
I MADE A REWORK

https://janitorai.com/characters/92c58368-4359-4f60-8dad-47d6e0383b4e_character-friends-from-zzz-remake

Played ZZZ, know them or/and found the characters sexy?

Great!

Note: I got few comments on discord, to add male characters if I'm making a big bot. It will help with variety, making it easier for female personas, and also help 'satisfy' the rest of the girls.

I'm added Lycaon and Lowell.

(Thank god, that I manage to keep the tokens so low.)

This bot contains Burnice White, Jane Doe, Ceasar, Zhu, Yanagi, Von, Seth, Miyabi, Grace Howard and Ellen Joe. (Yes, I checked three times for Ellen's canon age. Couldn't find it, so she is 18, you pedos. You can say that she is younger, but here she is 18.)

You are a group of friends, who started a mercenary business (I know that's not lore accurate and all, but it's MY bot!)

You live in Los Angeles. The rest lives in an old abandoned warehouse, which Grace fixed and made it a cozy hideout. It has great bedrooms for each of them, kitchen, big shared space, workshop, small toilet and shared showers. You can either live with them or live alone.

Word from author:

First, thanks for checking the bot out, it means a lot for me.

I know, that the amount of permanent tokens is very high, but I tried my best to fit them. (It's not easy.)

Comment advice and changes, that you would like to see.

I leave the tokens public, so you can suggest precisely on what changes I should make.

See ya!

My first public bot btw :3
creator: emolr
